back_translation: Paul, an apostle of Lord Jesus Christ by the will of God; to the saints who are in the city of Ephesus, and the faithful in Lord Jesus Christ
May grace and peace from God our Father, and from Lord Jesus Christ, abide with you
May blessing be given to God and the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us in Lord Christ with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly realms
Just as He has chosen us in Lord Christ, before the founding of the world, so that we may be holy and without blemish before His presence, with love
He has predetermined us beforehand to receive the right of being sons through Lord Jesus Christ, to come to be His own, according to His good purpose
For the praise of the glory of His grace, which He has bestowed upon us by grace, in the One who is His beloved
In the One who is beloved, we have redemption through His blood, that is, the forgiveness of trespasses, according to the riches of His grace
Which He has poured out abundantly upon us, with all wisdom and understanding
He has made us know the mystery of His will, according to His good purpose, which He has planned out beforehand in Lord Christ
As an administrative plan for the time that is fulfilled — to gather all things together as one in Lord Christ; both the things that are in the heavens and the things that are on the earth, in Him
In the One who is beloved, we have also been chosen to be God's own; we have been predetermined beforehand according to the plan of the One who works all things according to the counsel of His will
So that we who have hoped in Lord Christ first may be for the praise of His glory
In Him, you also heard the word of truth — that is, the gospel of your salvation; and in Him when you believed, you also received the seal of the Holy Spirit according to the promise
That Spirit is the down-payment of our inheritance, until the redemption of those who are God's possession comes, for the praise of His glory
Therefore, since I have heard about your faith in Lord Jesus and the love that you have toward all the saints
I have not stopped giving thanks for you, remembering you in my prayers
May the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, grant to you the Spirit of wisdom and revelation in the true knowledge of Him
May the eyes of your hearts be opened to light, so that you may know what the hope of His calling is, and what the riches of the glory of His inheritance among the saints is
And what the surpassing greatness of His power is, which is upon us who believe, according to the working of the powerful might of His strength
Which He has worked in Lord Christ, when He raised Him from the dead, and when He seated Him at the right hand of God in the heavenly realms
Above the rulers, the authorities, the powers, and all ruling-deities; including every name that is named, not only in this age but also in the age that is to come
God has subdued all things under His feet, and has given Lord Christ as head over all things for the church
Which the church is His body, that is, the fullness of the One who fills all things in every way
